name: AstroKalki — The Living Archive
description: Arena-ready export of the AstroKalki project: a museum-grade digital archive of Indic contemplative heritage.

structure.src/app: Next.js App Router pages and API routes
structure.src/lib: Domain logic (cosmology, lineage, archive seed, bootstrap)
structure.knowledge: Offline Tantra knowledge archive with FTS5 index

routes.description: Home with seven-pillar grid and constellation
Browse all siddhis
The Custodian search UI
5-tradition comparative matrix
Real-time planetary longitudes
Curated reading journey
Transmission maps
Codex Library
Reader safety and epistemic framing
Schools of thought
Per-practice deep folio
The Custodian weighted multi-field search
Liveness probe
Reader reflections (pen-name only)
Browse + search the offline knowledge archive (FTS5-backed)
FTS5 full-text search across knowledge archive chunks
Browse the yantra gallery — 12 scholarly renderings with cinematic motion
Yantra deep-view with bīja breakdown, symbolism, source citation
XML sitemap with all 35 siddhis + 18 yantras + static routes
Tag-based faceted browsing by category and tradition
Curated Sanskrit glossary with 80+ terms
Parallel-Sanskrit reader index
Parallel-Sanskrit verse with word-by-word parsing
Manuscript deep-view with catalogue record
pgvector semantic search
PWA manifest for installable web app + offline mode
Offline fallback page for service worker
Sanskrit morphological search (sandhi-aware stemmer + FTS5 expansion)
Encrypted personal sadhana journal (AES-256, local only)
41-day cycle tracker with daily check-in grid + progress bar
Digital japa mālā with haptic feedback, audio chime at 108, session persistence
Prāṇāyāma breath timer with 7 patterns, visual ring, audio cues, haptic feedback
Healing hub — affliction-to-practice cross-reference + encrypted case notes
Reading curriculum with 6 structured paths + per-siddhi progress tracking
Vedic lunar calendar with tithi computation + practice recommendations
Practice analytics: mood correlation, 90-day heatmap, top practices, japa stats
Dream journal with pattern detection + tagging (lucid, visitation, symbolic, etc.)
Crisis grounding library — instant-access 7-step protocol
Meditation timer with bell schedule + auto-logging to journal
Mantra audio recorder — encrypted, local only, playback for self-assessment
Mantra count calculator — plan anusthāna duration from target + practice rate
Practice ambience generator — tanpura drone, rain, fire, bells, Oṃ (Web Audio, no files)

knowledge_archive.note: 27 source documents: 4 PDFs + 23 markdown transcriptions. 8 categories. 21 high-caution and 6 moderate. Batch 3 added: Dakṣiṇa Kālī, Ṣoḍaśī Tripurasundarī, Bhuvaneśvarī, Kamalā, Bhairavī proper, Lakulīśa Pāśupata, Matsyendranāth Nāth.

arena_compatibility.note: All source files are in Arena-accepted formats. The 4 Tantra PDFs are PDF. Documentation is Markdown. Source is TypeScript/TSX. No ZIP uploads required.

ui_features.design_system: Living Esoteric Intelligence v1.6 — obsidian + gold + cyan + rose + purple
ui_features.random_siddhi_button: 🎲 in nav — jumps to a random folio
ui_features.sanskrit_morphological_search: sandhi-aware stemmer catches inflected forms (japati → japa, devaḥ → deva)
ui_features.encrypted_vault: AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2 100K iterations. All personal data encrypted at rest. No server, no cloud, no telemetry.
ui_features.personal_sadhana_journal: Practice session logging with mood tracking, insights, disturbances, dream logs
ui_features.cycle_tracker: 41/21/11/108-day cycle tracking with daily check-in grid + progress visualization
ui_features.digital_japa_mala: Tap-to-count with haptic feedback, audio chime at 108, session persistence, cumulative stats
ui_features.breath_timer: 7 breath patterns (Kumbhaka of Silence, Whisper Breath, Spine Flame, Shaman Triangle, Quantum Pause, Box, Nadi Shuddhi)
ui_features.healing_hub: Affliction-to-practice cross-reference (8 afflictions mapped to prescribed practices with sources) + encrypted case notes
ui_features.reading_curriculum: 6 structured paths (Vedic Foundations, Breath Path, Sri Vidya Graduation, Mahavidya Cycle, Sat-Karma Framework, Concentration Path) with per-siddhi progress tracking
ui_features.vault_passphrase: AES-256-GCM encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation, 3-attempt lockout, no recovery
ui_features.practice_streak_tracker: Homepage widget — consecutive-day streak with milestones (7/21/41/108)
ui_features.lunar_calendar: Vedic tithi computation with special-tithi practice recommendations
ui_features.practice_analytics: Mood correlation, 90-day heatmap, top practices, japa stats — all client-side
ui_features.dream_journal: Dream log aggregation with tagging + pattern detection
ui_features.meditation_timer: Configurable timer with interval bells + auto-journal logging
ui_features.mantra_recorder: Encrypted audio recording for pronunciation self-assessment
ui_features.count_calculator: Anusthāna planning tool — target count → duration timeline
ui_features.ambience_generator: Browser-generated tanpura/rain/fire/bells/Oṃ with per-source volume mixing
ui_features.session_builder: Multi-step practice playlists with auto-transition + bell
ui_features.sankalpa_builder: Intention formulation with templates + homepage pinning
ui_features.mantra_metronome: Visual pendulum + audio tick at configurable BPM
ui_features.energetic_state_journal: Prana level, cakra sensations, temperature shifts, subtle-body observations
ui_features.fasting_tracker: Upavasa tracking with type, timing, and state notes
ui_features.puja_materials: Shopping list + budget tracker for practice materials
ui_features.practice_dependencies: Prerequisite graph with completion status checking
ui_features.mantra_vault: Double-encrypted dīkṣā mantra storage with long-press reveal
ui_features.deity_of_day: Weekday-based deity rotation with Sanskrit + role
ui_features.mantra_flashcards: SM-2 spaced-repetition Sanskrit vocabulary from reader data
ui_features.seasonal_practice: Ayurvedic rtu (6 seasons) with practice recommendations
ui_features.quote_of_day: 15 curated quotes from primary sources, rotated daily
ui_features.protection_checklist: 8-item pre-practice protection verification (required items gate access)
ui_features.markdown_export: Full practice history export to .md file
ui_features.completion_certificate: Printable PDF certificate for completed sādhana cycles
ui_features.yantra_3d_viewer: CSS 3D layered yantra rotation for meditative viewing
ui_features.nav_reorganization: 5 categorized collapsible groups (Reference, Practice, Tracking, Healing, System) with hover dropdowns on desktop + accordion on mobile
ui_features.homepage_dashboard: Personal practice dashboard: tithi, deity, streak, active cycle, saṅkalpa, daily quote, season, quick actions
ui_features.deployment_guide: DEPLOYMENT.md with step-by-step Neon + Vercel free-tier deployment instructions
ui_features.cinematic_motion_system: v2.4 — ambient particles, aurora gradient, cinematic page entrances, scroll-driven reveals, 3D card tilt, kinetic typography, liquid transitions
ui_features.ambient_background: Fixed-position aurora gradient (30s shift) + 12 floating gold particles (16-28s cycles)
ui_features.cinematic_enter: 1.2s page entrance: opacity + translateY + brightness + blur (cubic-bezier)
ui_features.scroll_reveal: IntersectionObserver-triggered: opacity + clip-path + blur (1.2s, no layout shift)
ui_features.kinetic_typography: Word-by-word reveal with rotateX + blur for hero headings
ui_features.glass_morphism: Backdrop-blur glass cards with gold hairline borders
ui_features.enhanced_layout: Container-prose/wide, section rhythm (lg/md/sm), eyebrow with gold line
ui_features.ritual_mode: v2.5.4 — native disabled attr (not aria-disabled), throttled aria-live (state transitions only), separated keyboard hint text
ui_features.offering_interaction: Pointer-based press-and-hold with progress ring, charge state, release animation, haptic feedback, and audio chimes. Per-offering-type visual effects (fire/water/flower/incense/mantra/bell)
ui_features.ritual_state_machine: idle → pressing → charged → released → completed (with cancelled fallback). Data-driven step configs. Auto-logs to journal on completion.
ui_features.ritual_motion_system: v2.6.0 — Ritual Motion System OSS: centralized tokens, Motion variants, HeroMedia, AmbientBackground v2 (CSS-only, 3 motes), RitualSymbol (6 offering types with inline SVG+Motion), LayoutMotion (RouteTransition, ModalEnter, SheetSlideUp, SectionReveal), MotionConfig reducedMotion=user
